chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 211 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.851/2017. 3. For hearing of main case. 04.02.2025 Mr. Ajeet Sunder, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Tania Allam, advocate for the respondent No.2. Mr. Javed Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the respondent No.4. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per counsel for the petitioner, finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He states that it may be just and proper for this petition to be disposed of with directions to the department to finalize the assessment, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Respective counsel for the department have no objection in such regard. In view hereof, petition is disposed of as aforesaid. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
